flags.message: The cell's corpus query sidecar (127.0.0.1:8377) was unreachable — two `fedcourts query` attempts timed out — so no similar-prior retrieval ran. Landmark Towers, No. 19-241). If other cells in this run show the same timeout, the sidecar likely never started.
